What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A dark metallic wheel hub assembly with a splined axle shaft protrudes from the center while a silver wheel bearing unit sits separately in the foreground. A multi-spoke alloy wheel with a black tire is mounted on the vehicle, revealing a red brake caliper behind the spokes. A black metal jack stand supports the vehicle frame underneath the wheel assembly.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a grey Mini Cooper drives from left to right; at 2s, a close-up of the wheel hub assembly with a detached bearing appears; at 10s, the mounted wheel assembly supported by a jack stand is shown; at 12s, the tire sidewall lettering becomes clearly visible.
